title: australopyrum velutinum
side_effects: Australopyrum velutinum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or high doses of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, misuse of Australopyrum velutinum may cause more serious complications, such as liver damage and cardiovascular problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Australopyrum velutinum to ensure safe and effective use.
